AFFECT [[8850026134298937527]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
REMOVE [[4829825519784862555]][.[[233721384511543.6503816592]]=[[18307259815317701968]]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[18307259815317701968]]
LOCATE AFTER ALL
INSERT {
    ~&4829825519784862555&~ {
        ~&8399878573055752961&~: ~&"18113085378939370741&~
        ~&495331016591073787&~: ~&18307259815317701968&~.~&7082529440655&~()
    }
}
END TRAVERSE
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
